heroHeadline: Air Motors Built to Work Hard
heroSubheadline: We manufacture rugged, custom air motors from Montana. Thirty-five years of engineering behind every unit we ship.

valueProps.title: Custom-Built for Your Application
valueProps.description: Every motor we make fits your specific job. Tell us what you need — we engineer it.

valueProps.title: Power That Lasts
valueProps.description: Our motors run hard in tough conditions. Built rugged because that's the only way we build.

valueProps.title: Real Engineers, Real Answers
valueProps.description: Call us. Our application engineers know these motors inside out. We solve problems, not transfer calls.

aboutParagraph1: We started PSI Automation because we saw too many air motors fail when the job got hard. So we built better ones. For thirty-five years, we've designed and manufactured air motors right here in Montana for industries that can't afford downtime.
aboutParagraph2: We're not a catalog company. Every motor we sell, we can customize. Our engineers work directly with you to match the motor to your application.
titleTag: PSI Automation | Custom Air Motors | Montana
metaDescription: PSI Automation manufactures rugged, custom air motors in Montana. 35 years of power, durability, and application engineering. Call 800-392-3602.
footerTagline: Custom air motors engineered for the job.
